steps.title: Introduce the list
steps.content: The sentence says the poem contains three signature elements of Brooks's poetic style. The words after the blank name those elements: terse compressed lines, syncopated rhythms, and keen attention to everyday life. A colon is appropriate because it introduces the list.

steps.title: Eliminate boundary errors
steps.content: Choice A uses a period, leaving "Terse compressed lines" as a fragment. Choice B uses only commas, which do not clearly introduce the list. Choice D uses a semicolon before a list rather than after an independent clause. The colon after "style" correctly introduces the three elements. The answer is C.
